channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Earthquake-ravaged Venezuela marked its Independence Day yesterday
item.description: Venezuela marked its Independence Day amid the aftermath of twin earthquakes and sweeping political change following the U.S.-led removal of Nicolás Maduro.
item.content:encoded: Venezuela marked its Independence Day amid the aftermath of twin earthquakes and sweeping political change following the U.S.-led removal of Nicolás Maduro.
item.dc:creator: John Otis

item.title: USA set to take on Belgium in World Cup amid Trump red card controversy
item.description: Ahead of this evening's World Cup match between the U.S. and Belgium, the drama about the eligibility of U.S. striker Folarin Balogun continues to swirl following his red card in the previous match.
item.content:encoded: Ahead of this evening's World Cup match between the U.S. and Belgium, the drama about the eligibility of U.S. striker Folarin Balogun continues to swirl following his red card in the previous match.
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: What it means to be excommunicated from the Catholic Church for starting a schism
item.description: The Society of St. Pius X has responded defiantly to Pope Leo XIV's excommunication of the neotraditionalist group. What does the excommunication mean — and how will the schism affect the church?
item.content:encoded: The Society of St. Pius X has responded defiantly to Pope Leo XIV's excommunication of the neotraditionalist group. What does the excommunication mean — and how will the schism affect the church?
item.dc:creator: Jason DeRose

item.title: The Supreme Court said racism wasn't factor a in TPS ruling. Haitians think otherwise
item.description: President Trump has denigrated Haitian immigrants with language they consider racist. In its ruling allowing Trump to end TPS, the Supreme Court rejected that the administration was motivated by race.
item.content:encoded: President Trump has denigrated Haitian immigrants with language they consider racist. In its ruling allowing Trump to end TPS, the Supreme Court rejected that the administration was motivated by race.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Florido

item.title: If colleges don't leave grads better off, federal financial aid could be on the line
item.description: Republicans' new accountability test for colleges and universities will go into effect soon; the test will cut off federal aid to school programs whose graduates struggle to earn a reasonable living.
item.content:encoded: Republicans' new accountability test for colleges and universities will go into effect soon; the test will cut off federal aid to school programs whose graduates struggle to earn a reasonable living.
item.dc:creator: Cory Turner

item.title: FIFA red card reversal sparks controversy at the World Cup
item.description: FIFA lifted a one-match ban against a top U.S. player at the World Cup after President Trump asked for a review. NPR's Scott Detrow talks about the controversy with Franklin Foer of The Atlantic.
item.content:encoded: FIFA lifted a one-match ban against a top U.S. player at the World Cup after President Trump asked for a review. NPR's Scott Detrow talks about the controversy with Franklin Foer of The Atlantic.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Pierre

item.title: Get your reading glasses... in the post office
item.description: In some towns in India, people working for a non profit approach people who appear to have trouble reading small print to get them hooked up with glasses.
item.content:encoded: In some towns in India, people working for a non profit approach people who appear to have trouble reading small print to get them hooked up with glasses.
item.dc:creator: Gabrielle Emanuel

item.title: Russia-Ukraine war escalates before NATO summit
item.description: Russia pounds Kyiv ahead of NATO summit, as Ukraine war returns to center stage amid high-stakes diplomacy.
item.content:encoded: Russia pounds Kyiv ahead of NATO summit, as Ukraine war returns to center stage amid high-stakes diplomacy.
item.dc:creator: Joanna Kakissis

item.title: Kenya grapples with reduced U.S. aid
item.description: Purity Wambui was diagnosed with TB when it was pretty far advanced. It's possible that had health funding from the U.S. not been reduced, the illness may have been caught in time to save her.
item.content:encoded: Purity Wambui was diagnosed with TB when it was pretty far advanced. It's possible that had health funding from the U.S. not been reduced, the illness may have been caught in time to save her.
item.dc:creator: Ari Daniel

item.title: Construction workers cope with the challenges of a heatwave
item.description: Construction workers don't just stop during the heatwave, they find ways to cope with it. Many work hourly and can't afford not to.
item.content:encoded: Construction workers don't just stop during the heatwave, they find ways to cope with it. Many work hourly and can't afford not to.
item.dc:creator: Noor Nazir
